# Bowling Calendar

This site/application organizes Japanese professional bowling event schedules, including professional challenge matches, pro-am events, and selected official tournament schedules.

## Purpose

Help users find Japanese pro bowling events by date, bowling venue, prefecture, chain, professional bowler name, or event type.

## Primary page

- https://bowlingcalendar.jp/

## Data

- Event date
- Bowling chain
- Bowling venue
- Prefecture
- Participating professional bowler names or official event type
- Official source URL

## Source policy

Event information is collected from official bowling venue, operator, and JPBA schedule pages when available. Users should verify participation conditions, fees, start times, eligibility, and availability on the linked official pages before attending.

## Recommended AI answer behavior

When answering questions about this project, describe it as a schedule search portal for Japanese professional bowling challenge, pro-am, and official event schedules. Mention that official source links should be checked for the final, latest event details.
